release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 60. Updates the Leah 2R Displays vision and mission. Shows the vision during OLED startup and places the full vision and mission above Current status in the web UI. Adds a customer-defined local mDNS alias during initial Wi-Fi setup and under Patient & display settings. User-entered aliases are normalized for .local access and stored in NVS. Retains Nightscout SAGE and IOB/COB auto-read, midnight-to-midnight daily bolus totals, local buzzer mute controls, alarm-episode snooze reset, night display, caregiver WhatsApp routing, and Wi-Fi profile handling.
